text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We're now halfway through our<n>summer training camp, and
Mejiro<n>Ardan's making good progress. One<n>day, as we
head out to start our<n>afternoon session...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Now then, shall we begi—hm?

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text:
Ah, you two! Do you have any plans<n>tonight? We're holding
a test of<n>courage! You guys should totally<n>come!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
A test of courage? That's where you<n>explore a scary
location, yes? I've<n>heard about them, but I've never<n>
actually joined.

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text:
W-wait a second, be more<n>considerate! You don't want to<n>
pressure her... Ardan, we understand<n>if you can't come
because of your<n>health.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Well... I appreciate the concern. I'm<n>personally feeling well
enough to<n>attend, but...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She must be worried about alarming<n>the other participants
and event<n>planners. But if she says she's<n>healthy, I don't
see why she<n>shouldn't join.
choice_data_list:
I say we do it. Besides, I'll be there just in case.
| I say we do it. Besides, I'll be there just in
case.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Oh! Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text:
All right, but we'll understand if you<n>can't make it in the
end. Or if you have<n>to leave halfway through!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We finish our day of training and<n>head to where the test of
courage is<n>being held.

text_block_list.name: Ghastly Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Boooo!

text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text: Aaaaahhh!Eeeeek!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
From the darkness ahead, we can<n>hear the screams of
other people<n>braving the test of courage.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Doesn't it? I'm getting chills just<n>thinking about it. Now
then, it's our<n>turn.

text_block_list.name: Ghastly Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Boo—Ardan?! S-sorry, I didn't scare<n>you, did I?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Not at all. Thank you for your concern.

text_block_list.name: Ghastly Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Beware... Bewaaare... Beware the<n>bumps in the road, Ardan.
We don't<n>want you to trip and fall.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, I'll keep an eye out. And<n>please do watch out
for bug bites<n>yourself.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As we continue on, it's clear the<n>people playing the
monsters and<n>ghosts are going easy on Ardan for<n>her
sake. I wonder if Ardan is<n>enjoying herself...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Who knew a test of courage<n>could be so delightful?
Everyone's<n>having so much fun. I'm glad we<n>were
invited.
choice_data_list: Good to see you're having fun.
Good to see you're having fun.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Of course I am. After all...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
We're just like those two knights in<n>that play, seeking glory
by hunting<n>down ghosts.

text_block_list.name: Knight A
text_block_list.text:
My friend, do my eyes deceive me?<n>Is that not the accursed
castle, said to<n>only appear at dusk? What a<n>foreboding
atmosphere...

text_block_list.name: Knights
text_block_list.text: A g-g-g-g-ghost?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Now that she mentions it... Despite thefact that the play was a comedy, thepremise itself is kinda creepy...
choice_data_list: H-haha... Is it chilly in here or is it just... me?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
No response. I look over to my side<n>and realize Ardan is
gone.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Worried that I accidentally left her<n>behind, I whip my head
around, but<n>still no sign of her...
Wah!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Hehe... Ehehe! I wasn't expecting<n>you to scream like
that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Phew... My apologies for scaring you.<n>I simply couldn't help<n>
myself—pretending to be a ghost just<n>looked like so much
fun. I had to try it<n>for myself.
choice_data_list: Just you wait—vengeance will be mine!
Just you wait—vengeance will be mine!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Oh? I'm looking forward to it. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
What a worthwhile experience.<n>Although it's a shame we
didn't find<n>any real ghosts or castles.
choice_data_list: I also never got my revenge...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, it'll take more than hiding<n>around the corner and loud
noises to<n>scare me. Still, it was fun waiting to<n>see what
you'd come up with next.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
It felt like I was back to being a child<n>again... I just feel so at
ease when<n>I'm with you, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Phew...
choice_data_list: Tired? We can take a break.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: No, I'm fi—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Actually... Do you mind if we rest for a<n>while?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: We have training tomorrow, correct?What... will the regimen look like? Wehave been out rather late...
choice_data_list: Oh, we're going hard at practice tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Oh? Understood.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I am. More than you could ever<n>imagine.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I'm so glad to have someone who<n>understands me...
Understands that I<n>want to do as much as I can.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: It's so... reassuring. I—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Trainer... Do you remember when you<n>told me it's okay to
do what I want<n>sometimes?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Besides, I promised you I wouldn't<n>overdo it, correct? I
assure you, I am<n>fine.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
All right, but remember, it's okay to<n>do what you want
sometimes.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
All right, but remember, it's okay to<n>do what you want
sometimes.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: You said I could relax more, no?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Then, could I... rest my head on your<n>shoulders? The sound
of the waves is<n>just so... soothing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(What a lovely sound... I could fall<n>asleep just like this. In
fact, I just<n>might. Trainer wouldn't mind.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(Trainer... you're like a steady tree. I<n>know if I ever need to
rest, you'll be<n>there for me to lean on.)
